selectedSlice: Reuse the existing student-detail drawer for Admin Command Center Review Workload rows and preserve Admin Command Center detail context.
selectionReason: Current repo evidence showed a real protected-workspace gap: the admin dashboard route already returned reviewQueue rows with studentId, renderReviewQueueSummary() already supported allowStudentDetail: true, and Global Admin access to /api/site/students/:studentId was already established. The missing work was only in workspace.js context wiring, so enabling the row action and preserving adminDashboard as the detail source was the safest bounded batch.
candidateShortlist: Global Admin review workload student detail
Broader Global Admin route refresh across Recent Audit, Students, Presentation, Programs, and Users & Access
userFacingImprovement: Global Admins can now open Admin Command Center Review Workload rows directly into the existing student-detail drawer, and that detail now reloads and closes back inside the Admin Command Center instead of jumping to the broader Student Directory.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: The slice reuses the existing /api/site/students/:studentId route and student-detail drawer instead of adding a new route or broader query shape.
No auth, RBAC, tenant, site, program, mentor-assignment, or student-privacy boundary changed.
Admin Command Center detail URL state is limited to existing student-detail params and remains Global Admin-only through the current role checks.

validation.notes: Focused workspace syntax, workspace coverage, dashboard-action verification, and workspace-navigation verification passed before docs/state closeout. The full validation ladder also passed after the closeout files were updated.

deferred: Broader Global Admin route refresh remains larger than this bounded review-row detail slice.
Admin mentor-meeting follow-up still lacks a precise current destination.
Program Teacher mentor-meeting follow-up still lacks a precise scoped destination.
Hosted section-level permission proof still needs allowed hosted runtime and audit-event writes.
Review Queue missing-submission semantics remain deferred until backend rows or exact scoped empty-state evidence exist.
Viewer email visibility policy still needs a product decision before any UI change.
Mentor reassignment and removal workflow still needs mutation and audit design.
nextRecommended: Continue the bounded Global Admin route refresh only where the current workspace can prove an exact destination; keep mentor-meeting follow-up summary-only, and preserve Admin Command Center detail context now that review rows open the existing student drawer.
doNotRepeat: Do not remove the Admin Command Center Review Workload student-detail action while the existing /api/site/students/:studentId route remains authorized for Global Admins.
Do not force Admin Command Center review-row detail back to students source context now that adminDashboard return and URL state are proven.
Do not invent an Admin mentor-meeting drill-down until a real exact destination exists.
